sub_mechanisms: M_1: estimate per-step KS-entropy of hidden-state trajectory
M_2: detect monotonic rise (productive) vs plateau (saturation) vs spike (overfit) regimes
M_3: schedule next-batch difficulty conditional on regime
stripped_llm_application: A curriculum-scheduling signal based on the rate of structural-entropy growth in hidden-state trajectories during training; uses entropy production as the difficulty thermometer.
stripping_rule_applied: removed: KS, Kolmogorov-Sinai, ergodic, measure-preserving (the term 'entropy' retained as generic ML vocabulary)
